message:
Add loop protection to getUniqueDelimiter and escape bundle prompt IDs

- skills.ts: Add MAX_ATTEMPTS (100) limit to delimiter generation loop
  with timestamp fallback to prevent potential infinite loops
- bundles.ts: Use escapeYamlArrayItem for prompt IDs in YAML array
  for consistency with tag escaping in skills.ts

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
